plugins.photosPermission: This app needs access to your photo library to select a profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: This app needs access to your camera to take a new profile picture.

infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to select a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to take a new profile picture.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to your microphone to capture photos with sound.
